This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

languages.text: В конце первого {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} боя это существо использует способность {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Безумная калибровка: оскверненный металл{/g} на Осквернителя. Ее эффект длится 3 раунда. Эту {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} нельзя использовать, если существо {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинуто{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушено{/g} или было {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отброшено{/g}.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Mad Calibration: Tainted Metal{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: В конце первого {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} боя это существо использует способность {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Безумная калибровка: оскверненный металл{/g} на Осквернителя. Ее эффект длится 3 раунда. Эту {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} нельзя использовать, если существо {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинуто{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушено{/g} или было {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отброшено{/g}.

В конце первого {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} боя это существо использует способность {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Безумная калибровка: оскверненный металл{/g} на Осквернителя. Ее эффект длится 3 раунда. Эту {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} нельзя использовать, если существо {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинуто{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушено{/g} или было {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отброшено{/g}.

languages.text: À la fin du premier {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, cette créature utilise sur le Profanateur {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Calibrage débridé : métal corrompu{/g}, dont les effets durent 3 rounds. Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} ne peut pas être déclenchée si la créature est {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}paralysée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}étourdie{/g} ou {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}repoussée{/g}.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Mad Calibration: Tainted Metal{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: À la fin du premier {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, cette créature utilise sur le Profanateur {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Calibrage débridé : métal corrompu{/g}, dont les effets durent 3 rounds. Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} ne peut pas être déclenchée si la créature est {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}paralysée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}étourdie{/g} ou {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}repoussée{/g}.

languages.text: Bu yaratık, ilk {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raundun{/g} sonunda Kirleten üzerinde {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Çılgınca Kalibrasyon: Murdar Metal{/g} kullanır. Etkisi, 3 raunt sürer. Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g}; yaratık {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilmişse{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemlemişse{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}itilmişse{/g} kullanılamaz.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Mad Calibration: Tainted Metal{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: Bu yaratık, ilk {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raundun{/g} sonunda Kirleten üzerinde {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Çılgınca Kalibrasyon: Murdar Metal{/g} kullanır. Etkisi, 3 raunt sürer. Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g}; yaratık {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilmişse{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemlemişse{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}itilmişse{/g} kullanılamaz.

languages.text: 第1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}结束时，该生物会对污染者使用{g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}疯狂校准：污秽金属{/g}，持续3轮。该生物若陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}或被{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}击退{/g}状态，则无法发动此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}。
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Mad Calibration: Tainted Metal{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: 第1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}结束时，该生物会对污染者使用{g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}疯狂校准：污秽金属{/g}，持续3轮。该生物若陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}或被{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}击退{/g}状态，则无法发动此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}。

languages.text: Al final del primer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, esta criatura utiliza {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Calibración demencial: Metal corrompido{/g} sobre el Profanador; su efecto dura 3 asaltos. Esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} no puede utilizarse si la criatura ha resultado {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribada{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdida{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}empujada{/g}.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Mad Calibration: Tainted Metal{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: Al final del primer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, esta criatura utiliza {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Calibración demencial: Metal corrompido{/g} sobre el Profanador; su efecto dura 3 asaltos. Esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} no puede utilizarse si la criatura ha resultado {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribada{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdida{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}empujada{/g}.

languages.text: Am Ende der ersten {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} belegt diese Kreatur die Geißel mit {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Verrückte Kalibrierung: Beflecktes Metall{/g}. Dieser Effekt dauert 3 Runden lang an. Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} kann nicht eingesetzt werden, wenn die Kreatur {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}zurückgestoßen{/g} wurde.
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Mad Calibration: Tainted Metal{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: Am Ende der ersten {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} belegt diese Kreatur die Geißel mit {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Verrückte Kalibrierung: Beflecktes Metall{/g}. Dieser Effekt dauert 3 Runden lang an. Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} kann nicht eingesetzt werden, wenn die Kreatur {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}betäubt{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}zurückgestoßen{/g} wurde.

languages.text: 1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}目終了時に、このクリーチャーは「{g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}汚染された金属の狂気調整{/g}」を「汚染者」に発動し、3ラウンド間継続する。このクリーチャーが「{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}伏せ{/g}」「{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}気絶{/g}」または「{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}押された{/g}」状態であれば、この{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}は使用できない。
languages.original_text: At the end of the first {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, this creature uses {g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}Mad Calibration: Tainted Metal{/g} on the Defiler, lasting for 3 rounds. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used if the creature is {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} away.

traits.locale_text: 1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}目終了時に、このクリーチャーは「{g|f:08dce81ae1254639a6c633acd56611ca}汚染された金属の狂気調整{/g}」を「汚染者」に発動し、3ラウンド間継続する。このクリーチャーが「{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}伏せ{/g}」「{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}気絶{/g}」または「{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}押された{/g}」状態であれば、この{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}は使用できない。
